types.name: ENFP - Campaigner
types.short_description: Enthusiastic, creative, sociable free spirits who can always find a reason to smile.
types.relationships: Warm, enthusiastic partners; need emotional connection and shared values.
types.share_text: I took the i-personality quiz and got ENFP — Campaigner. Discover your type!

types.name: INTJ - Architect
types.short_description: Strategic, independent thinkers with a plan for everything.
types.relationships: Reserved but loyal; value intellectual compatibility and independence.
types.share_text: I found out I'm INTJ — Architect on i-personality.

types.name: ESFJ - Consul
types.short_description: Caring, social, and organized helpers who put people first.
types.relationships: Warm and dependable; build strong traditions and close social ties.
types.share_text: I got ESFJ on i-personality — caring and community-oriented.

types.name: ISTP - Virtuoso
types.short_description: Practical, observant problem-solvers who love to experiment and build.
types.relationships: Low-drama and pragmatic; appreciate space and shared activities.
types.share_text: I discovered I'm ISTP — Virtuoso on i-personality.
